hero.title: Step into our faithfully Malaysian metaverse.
hero.tagline: Embark on an extraordinary journey with MYSverse, where fun, education, and Malaysian culture converge in our virtual experiences, on Roblox and beyond.
hero.comingSoon: ...and more open experiences for everyone, coming soon!

Footer.ownedBy: Owned and operated by MYSverse Digital Ventures (AS0469188-M).
Footer.disclaimer: All assets used are property of their respective owners.

Contact.title: Get in touch
Contact.desc: Tell us what your enquiry is about and we'll point you to the right channel. We bring over 10 years of combined player and developer experience to the table.

ContactRouter.heading: What can we help you with?
ContactRouter.subheading: Pick a topic and we'll point you to the right channel.
ContactRouter.note: MYSverse is run entirely by volunteers and we get a lot of messages. We read everything, but replies can take a few days, so serious enquiries are best sent by email.

community.label: Games & community
community.description: Game help, bug reports, feedback and chat
community.resultBody: Our Discord server is the fastest way to get help, since the team and fellow players hang out there every day. If you'd rather just follow along, our WhatsApp channel has the latest announcements.

business.label: Business, partnerships & legal
business.resultBody: Serious enquiries sent by email get priority and reach the right person directly. Include some background and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

press.label: Press & media
press.resultBody: We're happy to help with stories about MYSverse and Malaysian game development. Include your publication and deadline in your email so we can get back to you in time.

join.label: Join the team
join.description: Volunteer with us as a developer or creator
join.resultBody: MYSverse is built entirely by volunteers, and we're always looking for new contributors. Check out our open roles and what it's like to work with us.

other.label: Something else
other.description: Anything that doesn't fit the above
other.resultBody: Not sure where your enquiry fits? Send us a WhatsApp message and we'll point you in the right direction. As a volunteer team we can take a while to reply, so anything serious is still best sent by email.

mys.title: From our real-world blog
mys.desc: Keep up with what the team has been working on in our latest blog posts.

nws.title: From MYSverse Sim
nws.desc: Explore in-universe news by our virtual media service NWS.

JoinTeam.label: Join the team
JoinTeam.title: Build the next MYSverse update
JoinTeam.desc: We're hiring volunteer developers to help shape Sumaya, Lebuhraya, Bandaraya and more, with real benefits.

Projects.title: Our projects
Projects.desc1: Did you know that MYSverse is developed and still fully operated by volunteers? What started as a small group making authentic Malaysian roleplay experiences has grown into a community of thousands.
Projects.desc2: Today, our mission remains the same: keeping the authenticity that started it all, while making our experiences accessible and enjoyable for everyone.
Projects.simDesc: MYSverse Sim offers serious, realistic roleplay with an educational twist. Activities are disciplined and structured, with off-platform training and certification for those who want to go deeper.
Projects.networkDesc: A collaborative platform that brings together Malaysian-themed projects and communities on Roblox, from MYSverse and other creators. By sharing resources, knowledge and experiences, we hope to grow a network of projects across many genres that celebrates Malaysian culture and creativity.
Projects.outreachDesc: MYSverse also has a life outside the game. We work with organisations and institutions to explore how MYSverse can support their goals, from education to community engagement.

lebuhraya.tagline: Cruise long highways or jump into police and firefighter roleplay. An easy way to unwind and experience everyday Malaysian life on the road.

ruumah_v4.tagline: Our latest Raya celebration is set in *Kampung Air*, Sabah's water villages and one of the most picturesque corners of Malaysia.

ruumah_v3.tagline: Come celebrate Raya in a lively suburban setting! You'll find local treats, cultural spots, and familiar MYSverse community references. It's a joyful part of our yearly virtual open house tradition.

ruumah_v2.tagline: Celebrate the festive season in a charming coastal *kampung*. This edition is full of little details, good food and a strong sense of community.

bandaraya_klasik.tagline: Take a trip back to the early days of [MYS] Malaysia! This classic edition opens KL 2.9 for everyone to enjoy, with its original environment, updated compatibility, and teams that are free for all to join.

sumaya.tagline: Inspired by Beaufort, a rural Sabahan district, Sumaya (formerly Daerah) is our most ambitious project so far. Its open-ended, story-rich gameplay gives both new and returning players something completely fresh in the MYSverse.

bandaraya_v3.tagline: Explore a virtual Kuala Lumpur built for roleplay, whether you're living daily life or on official duty. As MYSverse's main city hub, there's always something happening.

bandaraya_v4.tagline: Our next big city update expands into Dataran Merdeka! Expect iconic landmarks, better vehicle systems and more roleplay jobs, while staying true to the city's heritage.

tentera_mysverse.tagline: A long-standing part of MYSverse Sim, our military roleplay agency uses carefully researched equipment, procedures and training to portray Malaysia's Armed Forces authentically and respectfully.

polis_mysverse.tagline: Our police roleplay community is built on realism, teamwork and service, covering everything from managing traffic to handling tactical situations. It's a big part of life in MYSverse Sim places like Bandaraya.

bomba_mysverse.tagline: Become a part of the MYSverse firefighting team! You'll respond to emergencies using some of the most advanced virtual fire-rescue equipment you can find on Roblox.

kesihatan_mysverse.tagline: Our healthcare roleplay community lets you play as doctors, nurses and paramedics, taking part in emergency scenarios and public health activities across the MYSverse Sim world.

mysair.tagline: Once Malaysia Airways, now MYSair takes you *beyond continents*. Fly as a passenger or join the crew for ro-aviation with warm Malaysian hospitality, sharing our culture with a global audience.

tehlife.tagline: A lively virtual café inspired by Malaysian bubble tea spots, with a flavour of its own. *Tea is life* here, with drinks from boba to kopi. It's where café culture and the MYSverse community meet.

unicri_workshop.tagline: We were invited by UNICRI and Singapore's Ministry of Home Affairs to present at a workshop on Online Radicalisation and Extremism, where we shared MYSverse's community-led approach to moderation and community standards.

searcct_strategic_planning_meeting.tagline: We took part in SEARCCT's Strategic Planning Meeting under the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Malaysia, discussing how the video games community can help counter harmful narratives through digital engagement, storytelling and positive online spaces.

adcs_2025.tagline: We attended the ASEAN Digital Content Summit 2025, one of Southeast Asia's biggest gaming and digital content events! Our Lebuhraya racing challenges drew crowds, and we met hundreds of attendees from across the region's gaming industry.

searcct.tagline: Our team met up with the Southeast Asia Regional Centre for Counter-Terrorism, where we shared how MYSverse has been building a safe and secure community online for over 10 years through active moderation and other policies.

immerse_kl_25.tagline: We showcased MYSverse at IMMERSE KL x CelcomDigi, Malaysia's biggest event for immersive technology and creative content, and met industry leaders and community members in person!

kementerian_pertahanan.tagline: We had a productive meeting with the Ministry of Defence, discussing how MYSverse can support their goals in education, community engagement, and public awareness.

nst_viral_feature.tagline: The New Straits Times featured MYSverse's virtual election for its 22nd Prime Minister! The story covered our civic education efforts and how young Malaysians take part in a simulated democracy.

mercy_malaysia_imu.tagline: We met up with MERCY Malaysia and IMU to explore how engaging digital experiences, like MYSverse, can help them spread health awareness.

u_digitaloka.tagline: We showcased MYSverse at UiTM Shah Alam with the Ministry of Digital, showing how the platform can share Malaysian cultural and historical stories.

polis_diraja_malaysia.tagline: We're in discussions with the Royal Malaysia Police about using virtual spaces to build public awareness, promote safety and improve understanding of police work in Malaysia.

donation_to_gaza_relief.tagline: MYSverse donated RM1,000 to Persatuan Cinta Gaza Malaysia, while continuing to maintain a neutral platform policy on Roblox.

maxis_ekelas_minigames.tagline: Core MYSverse team members independently developed these educational minigames for Maxis eKelas. They are part of the Kancil Award-winning Misi Jelajah Digital and promote STEM learning through fun, interactive play.

Contribute.title: Contribute
Contribute.desc: Join the MYSverse Dev Team. We're hiring two volunteer roles, Head Developer and Developer, with real benefits including Pay-Per-Task pay, revenue sharing, monthly bonuses and more.
Contribute.ogTitle: Build the Malaysian Metaverse With Us - Join MYSverse
Contribute.ogDesc: Join the MYSverse Dev Team! Apply for volunteer developer roles and build experiences played by thousands. Enjoy real benefits like Pay-Per-Task bounties, revenue sharing, and monthly bonuses.
Contribute.ogAlt: Join the MYSverse Dev Team - Build the Malaysian Metaverse

model.label: Our model
model.title: Volunteer-driven, experience-focused
model.desc: MYSverse is built by volunteers from all walks of life: students, professionals and hobbyists who enjoy building things together. Our Pay-Per-Task bounty system means you can earn while you learn, on a schedule that works for you.

secondary.label: Not a developer?
secondary.title: Other ways to contribute
secondary.desc: We're always glad to welcome new faces. These roles don't have a formal application yet, so just reach out on Discord if you're interested.

questions.title: Still have questions?
questions.desc: Get in touch and the team will be happy to help.

hero.title: Build the Malaysian metaverse with us.
hero.desc: We're hiring two volunteer development roles with real benefits. Earn through our Pay-Per-Task system, share in revenue, and get an official welcome package, all while building experiences played by thousands.

openPositions.label: Open positions
openPositions.title: Two ways to join the Dev Team
openPositions.desc: Pick the role that fits you and apply directly. Both are volunteer roles with real benefits.

revenue_sharing.title: Revenue Sharing
revenue_sharing.desc: Earn a share of game revenue (exclusive to Head Developer role).

pay_per_task.title: Pay Per Task (PPT)
pay_per_task.desc: Guaranteed RM20.00 / 1,200 Robux per estimation point via DevHub, paid weekly.

monthly_bonuses.title: Monthly Bonuses
monthly_bonuses.desc: Up to RM10.00 / 500 Robux per estimation point for bugs, reviews, and refactoring.

welcome_package.title: Welcome Package
welcome_package.desc: Free embroidery polo, hoodie, lanyard, tote bag, and sticker pack shipped to you.

professional_development.title: Professional Development
professional_development.desc: Grow your skills and network with the wider MYSverse community.

discord.label: Join our Discord
discord.desc: Connect with the team and get started

email.label: Send us an email
email.desc: Reach out directly to the team

step1.title: Choose your role & apply
step1.desc: Submit the application form for the role that fits you. It only takes a few minutes.

step2.title: We review your application
step2.desc: Our team reviews every submission. We value clear, proactive communication.

step3.title: Interview or onboarding
step3.desc: Head Developer applicants proceed to an interview; Developers are onboarded to the Dev Team.

head-developer.tagline: Lead the Dev Team across Lebuhraya, Sumaya and Bandaraya.
head-developer.description: A volunteer-with-benefits role as Head Developer of the MYSverse Dev Team. Manage our projects (Lebuhraya, Sumaya and Bandaraya) and lead the Dev Team in keeping them updated and shipping new content. You'll bridge Administration and the Dev Team, making sure both sides are heard. Fully remote, with proactive communication.

lookingFor.0: Communicate tasks, requests and information clearly and concisely
lookingFor.1: Manage multiple team members with a variety of skillsets
lookingFor.2: Generate new content ideas for our experiences
lookingFor.3: Experienced and knowledgeable with Roblox Studio

head-developer.formAsksFor: CV/resume (PDF), full name, preferred contact, and 3 short questions.
head-developer.note: Accepted applicants proceed to an interview stage.

developer.tagline: Builders, scripters, modellers, designers and editors welcome.
developer.description: A volunteer-with-benefits role as a Developer of the MYSverse Dev Team. Builders, Scripters, 3D Modellers, Graphic Designers and Video Editors are all welcome. Work on current and future MYSverse experiences using your skillset and your own ideas, from updates for existing games to entirely new titles.

lookingFor.2: A quick learner, able to adapt

developer.formAsksFor: Preferred name, contact, skillset, proof of work (up to 5 files), and 3 short questions.
developer.disclaimer: This is a volunteer-basis role. We do not offer full-time employment.

moderator.title: Moderator
moderator.description: Be the backbone of our community. Moderators help keep MYSverse a safe, welcoming, and enjoyable space for thousands of players across our experiences.

features.0: Serve and protect a community of thousands of players
features.1: Access to moderation tools and training resources
features.2: Develop leadership and conflict resolution skills
features.3: Be part of a close-knit moderation team

content_creator.title: Content Creator
content_creator.description: Help tell the MYSverse story. From social media to video production, content creators bring our community and experiences to life for a wider audience.

features.0: Create content across social media platforms
features.1: Produce videos, graphics, and written content
features.2: Collaborate with the team on campaigns and events
features.3: Grow your creative portfolio and audience

devhub.title: Developer Operations & Rewards
devhub.desc: While we are a volunteer team, we believe your time, effort, and skills are incredibly valuable. We built DevHub—our custom developer dashboard that translates your contributions into real-world rewards, professional physical gear, and career milestones.

ppt.title: Guaranteed Task Payouts (PPT)
ppt.desc: Every task you claim on our Linear workspace has an estimate in points. When you complete a task labeled PPT (Points Payout System), you are guaranteed a direct payout based on the task's estimate.
ppt.myrRate: RM20.00 per estimation point (e.g., 3-point task = RM60.00)
ppt.robuxRate: 1,200 Robux per estimation point (e.g., 3-point task = 3,600 Robux)
ppt.weekly: Weekly approvals processed automatically (Billplz, Xendit, FinSys).
ppt.accounting: Download PDF transaction slips directly from your dashboard.

incentives.title: Weekly & Lifetime Incentives
incentives.desc: On top of your standard PPT earnings, our active developer incentive program rewards consistency, throughput, and long-term commitment:
incentives.throughput: Weekly Throughput: Complete 5+ qualifying tasks in a single week to instantly secure an extra RM30.00 / 1,800 Robux bonus.
incentives.kickers: Active-Day Kickers: Get rewarded just for showing up. Meeting our daily activity targets adds an extra kicker to your weekly payout.
incentives.streaks: Streak Bonuses: Hit your weekly throughput targets consecutive weeks in a row to stack up additional rewards.

milestones.title: Lifetime Milestones
milestones.desc: Celebrate your growth and achievements with lump-sum payouts as you complete tasks:

bonuses.title: Discretionary Monthly Bonuses
bonuses.desc: Not all important work can be labeled with a simple PPT estimate. Bug fixing, refactoring, code reviews, assisting other team members, and maintaining documentation are crucial to our success.
bonuses.sync: Automatic Sync: All non-PPT Linear tasks assigned to you are synced automatically as 'Bonus Candidates'.
bonuses.reviews: Monthly Reviews: Admins review your contributions and approve a grouped monthly bonus payout at up to RM10.00 / 500 Robux per estimation point.
bonuses.alerts: In-App Alerts: Receive real-time push and email notifications showing your potential bonus earnings (Up to X).

welcomePack.title: The MYSverse Welcome Pack
welcomePack.desc: Become an active developer on the team to receive our exclusive, physical Welcome Pack shipped straight to your door, completely free of charge.
welcomePack.tote: Canvas Tote Bag for your daily gear
welcomePack.tracking: Fulfillment Tracking: Select apparel sizes and track shipping status in real time inside DevHub.

onboarding.title: Frictionless Onboarding & Integrations
onboarding.desc: We want you to spend your time writing code, not wrestling with access permissions or paperwork. DevHub automates the administrative overhead:
onboarding.linking: One-Click Linking: Instantly connect your Linear, Discord, and Roblox accounts.
onboarding.sync: Access Sync: Grants appropriate Discord roles and Roblox Group ranks based on project assignments.
onboarding.compliance: Paperless Compliance: Review and digitally sign your NDA and Conflict of Interest (COI) documents directly inside the portal.
onboarding.kyc: KYC Verification: Fast-tracked, secure identity verification guarantees safe and legal payouts.

getStarted.title: Ready to build something great?
getStarted.subtitle: We combine the best of both worlds: the freedom and community of a volunteer project, backed by the professional structure, swag, and financial rewards of a commercial studio.
getStarted.step1: Sign in to DevHub using your OAuth account.
getStarted.step2: Complete your onboarding checklist (profile, account linking, NDA).
getStarted.step3: Grab your first Linear task and start earning!

career.title: NEW FREE CAREER
career.subtitle: WASTE DISPOSAL
career.hoverDesc: Help keep the highways clean and earn rewards!

season.title: NEW FEATURE
season.subtitle: SEASON PASS
season.hoverDesc: Unlock exclusive rewards and challenges every season!

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.desc: Terms and conditions governing the use of MYSverse services and developer payout platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: Privacy policy for MYSverse, detailing how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.desc: Refund policy for MYSverse, covering developer payouts and payment dispute resolution.
